Systemd deployment repair

Set WorkingDirectory before restart. The service worked in a terminal but failed when systemd started it from a different directory. 

sudo systemctl daemon-reload
sudo systemctl restart mema

保存这段中文内容，并确认备注中的表情符号不会被错误截断。

هذا نص لاختبار تحديد النص من اليمين إلى اليسار.
